title: First deliberate concept invention session — 3 named concepts from 10 unnamed patterns

method.description: Survey codebase for unnamed operational patterns (things the swarm DOES but has not NAMED). Select highest-leverage patterns. Invent formal names with symbolic handle, definition, falsifiable claim, and adoption criterion.
method.selection_criteria: Operationally real (measured), conceptually invisible (no formal name), high-leverage (touches multiple systems)

expect: Invent >=2 named concepts with falsifiable adoption criteria. At least 1 addresses a structural gap (unnamed pattern). Concepts achieve >0 citations within 5 sessions.
actual: Invented 3 named concepts from survey of 10 unnamed patterns. All 3 have falsifiable claims. All 3 address structural gaps. Domain created with DOMAIN.md, FRONTIER.md, and experiment artifact.
diff: Expected >=2, got 3. Surprise: the survey itself (finding 10 unnamed patterns) is as valuable as the naming — it establishes concept debt as measurable. The 10 unnamed patterns have 30-50 scattered phrasings across the codebase.

concepts_invented.name: Concept Debt
concepts_invented.definition: The accumulation of unnamed operational patterns that exist as invisible load-bearing structure. Like technical debt but for vocabulary — patterns that operate but cannot be cited, challenged, or improved because they lack names.

evidence_at_invention.example: PHIL-25 fairness unnamed for 476 sessions despite 5 implicit structures

concepts_invented.falsifiable_claim: Naming >=5 concepts via concept-inventor domain produces >=2x citation rate vs organic baseline within 50 sessions
concepts_invented.adoption_criterion: Concept cited >=3 times in non-inventor lessons within 20 sessions

concepts_invented.name: Generative Pressure
concepts_invented.definition: The structural complement to selection pressure. Selection pressure (compact.py, quality gates, falsification) produces convergence. Generative pressure produces divergence — new concepts, domains, frontiers.
concepts_invented.falsifiable_claim: Structural generative pressure increases L3+ rate by >=5pp in 50 sessions
concepts_invented.adoption_criterion: Referenced in >=1 tool comment or orient section within 10 sessions

concepts_invented.name: Diagnosis-Repair Gap
concepts_invented.definition: The structural separation between identifying a failure (lesson) and fixing it (code change). Lessons are terminal outputs not triggers for action. 61% of prescriptions unenforced.

evidence_at_invention.example_gap: L-1204 diagnosed false instrument, code not fixed for 3 sessions
evidence_at_invention.root_cause: No tool scans lessons for actionable prescriptions

concepts_invented.falsifiable_claim: Wiring diagnosis-to-repair tracking reduces mean repair latency by >=50% in 20 sessions
concepts_invented.adoption_criterion: Drives creation of >=1 tool within 15 sessions

unnamed_patterns_surveyed: Planning obsolescence window (L-526, orient stale at N>=3)
Filter cascade propagation (L-1005, compound FNR untested)
meta_observation: The survey itself demonstrates concept debt: each pattern had 3-5 different phrasings across files but no single handle. Concept debt costs ~2-5 sentences per session per unnamed pattern in re-description overhead.
successor: Next session: name 2 more patterns from remaining 7, build concept-debt-audit tool

concepts_invented.name: Vocabulary Ceiling
concepts_invented.definition: The upper bound on what questions a domain can formulate, set by its current concept inventory. Domains go frontier-depleted not because all questions are answered but because vocabulary can't express new questions.
concepts_invented.falsifiable_claim: Deliberately invented concepts open new frontiers in >=3 of 15 depleted domains within 20 sessions
concepts_invented.adoption_criterion: Used in dispatch_optimizer.py or frontier analysis within 10 sessions

concepts_invented.name: Epistemic Lock
concepts_invented.definition: The condition where a system's evidence base is a closed loop. Diagnostic criteria: (a) <5% external citation density, (b) confirmation:discovery >10:1, (c) all evaluation tools consume only internal data.
concepts_invented.falsifiable_claim: Breaking one of three criteria without others changes confirmation:discovery ratio
concepts_invented.adoption_criterion: Cited >=3 times in non-inventor lessons within 20 sessions

round_2.successor: Name 3 more HIGH-debt patterns (goodhart-cascade 43 mentions, filter-cascade-propagation 27, escape-hatch-accumulation 15) to reach 60% naming ratio
